title: Essentials++
description: Essentials for playing Minecraft Java Edition at it's full potential.
body:
[![A banner promoting the promo code ESS25OFF to get 25% off Minecraft Server hosting on Sparked Host.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/694326743b6d80ba95b5c1e2c9d9c8f02a1a0b1b.jpeg)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=2757)
Click the banner to make an account on Sparked Host and use the code ESS25OFF to get a 25% discount at checkout!

----------------------------------
This Modpack will try to make your Minecraft Java Edition experience as better as possible.

This Modpack adds mods like World Edit, that is used for modifying the Minecraft World in Creative, and mods like Essential, that add the ability to invite other players to your singleplayer world and more!

Any questions or inquiries? Please join the discord server here: 
https://discord.gg/5x35BJPCSX
